publicationStmt.publisher: "Maryland, Register of Wills Records, 1629-1999." Images. FamilySearch. http://FamilySearch.org: 3 December 2024. Citing Prerogative Court. Hall of Records, Annapolis.

div.head: Archibald Wahob. Will.
div.p:
In the name of God Amen. The first day of December in the year of
our Lord one thousand six hundred eighty and three I Archibald Wahob of
Fort Tobacco in Charles County being sick of body but of god annd perfect memory
thanks be to almighty God and calling to remembrance the uncertain Estate of
this transitory life and that all flesh must yield unto Death when it
shall please god to call do make Constitute ordain and declare this to be
my last will and Testament in manner and form following revvoking and
annuling by these presents all and very testamnet and testamnets will and
wills heretofore made and declare either by word or writing and this
to be taken only for my last will and testament and none other and first
being pernitent? and sorry from the bottom of my heart for my sins past
humbly desiring foregiveness for the same I give and commit my soule unto
almighty God my saviour and redeemer in whome and by the merits
of Jesus Christ I trust and believe a-- to be saved & to have -- &
day of resurrection shall rise again with Joy and throughout the merits of Chirst
death and passion shall profit and inherit the kingdom of heaven p--
for his elect and chosen and my body to be buried in such place whee it shall
please my executor or Executors hereafter to appoint and now for the
setling
setling of my teporal Estate & such good Chattles and debts as it shall
okeased almighty God for above my d-- to bestowe upon me
I doe order give and d-- the same in manner and form following
(that is to say --) I will that all those debts and duties that I owe in
right or con-- to any manner of person or persons what -- shall
be well and truly contented an paid within convenient time hereafter
my decease by my Executor or Executors hereafter named

I do give and bequeath unti my well beloved wife Elizabeth Wahob all
Port Tobacco C-- in Charles County one hundred acres of land
to hold to her and her -- and the apportenances? thereunto belinging to have &
after the decease of my beloved wife I do give and bequeath the afores.
hundred acres unto my beloved Daughter Margaret Lemaine the
wife of John Lemaine to have and to hold the said land with the --
tenants unto her & her heirs forever alsoe I do gove and bequeath unto
situate and being at un-- in Charles County -- adjoining to
the land of Maj. John Wheeler to have and to hold to her and her --
during her natural life and after the decease of my beloved wife I do
give and bequeath the s. two hundred acres of Land unto my well beloved
daughter Elizabeth Hoskins the wife of Philip Hoskins to have and to hold
to her and her heirs with the app- forever but in case my well
beloved wife Elizabeth Wahob should prove with child and by the blessing
of God should bring forth either a son or Daughter then the aforesaid two
parcells of land shall be enjoyed and p-- by the said Child --
of her body after her decease to her or her heirs forever with the --
not with -- things above mentioned but if she have no child
then
then the aforesaid two parcells of Land to be enjoyed and p-- by the aforesaid
Margaret Lemaine and Elizabeth Hoskins as above mentioned.

Item. I do give and bequeath unto my wel beloved Daughter Margaret Lemaine
one shilling sterling money. I do give and bequeath unto my well beloved
Daughter Elizabeth Hoskins one shilling sterling money.

It. I do give and bequeath unto my two grand children Benedicta Hoskins & Jane Hoskins
the Daughter of Philip & Elizabeth Hoskins each of them a heifer take delivered
to them within convenient time after my decease.

It. I do give and bequeath all the rest of my person Estate that is hath please
almighty God to bestow upon me unto my well beloved wife Elizabeth
Wahob & I do hereby ordain and appoint her to be the hole and sole Exector
of this last will and testament In witness hereof I have hereunto put my hand
and seal the day & year above written.

Signed sealed delivered & published
In the presence of
his
Peter P. Farnandis?
mark
John Bayne.-- Lomas
Archibald Wahol
his mark

On the back of the aforegoing will was Endorsed the following probate (to will)
March 10th 1683 This will was proved in common form by the oath of John
Bayne Peter Farnandis& -- Lomas the witnesses to the same before me
8 sides
-- Chandler
